message.content:
@startuml
title Policy Authorization flow between Smart Edge Open and 5G core

skinparam shadowing false
skinparam roundcorner 15
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor #000000
  LifeLineBorderColor #666666
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
  ActorBorderColor #666666
  ActorBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  BoxBorderColor #666666
  BoxFontStyle bold
}

actor "User/Admin" as UA

box "Smart Edge Open Controller Components" #BFE3F2
  participant "CLI" as CLI
  participant "Af Microservice" as AF
end box

box "5G Core Components" #98F29A
  participant "NEF" as NEF
  participant "NGC CP Function" as NGC
end box

note over NEF
Smart Edge Open provided
Core component with
limited functionality
end note

group "Policy Authorization  -  Individual Application Session Context creation flow"
  UA -> CLI : Create application session\ncontext
  CLI -> AF : /af/v1/policy-authorization/app-sessions\nPOST
  AF -> NGC : /npcf-policyauthorization/v1/app-sessions\nPOST
  NGC --> AF : 201 Created: app-sessionId \\\nERROR
  AF --> CLI : 201 Created: app-sessionId \\\nERROR
  CLI --> UA : Success: app-sessionId
end group

@enduml
